rulings.Case Title: JEFF BREIBART VS. ROBERT D. FOSTER et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 1, 2008, line 1, DEFENDANT ROBERT FOSTER'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE MOTION WAS NOT BROUGHT WITHIN A REASONABLE PERIOD OF TIME AS REQUIRED BY CCP SECTION 473(b). =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: JACK WILKEN VS. FRUITVALE HEALTHCARE CENTER et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 1, 2008, line 2, DEFENDANT SSC OAKLAND FRUITVALE OPERATING COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE COMPLAINT IN PARAGRAPHS 18, 19, 20, 28 AND 33 SETS FORTH SUFFICIENT FACTS TO MEET THE HEIGHTENED PLEADING REQUIREMENTS FOR AN ELDER ABUSE CLAIM. =(302/PJM/JW)

rulings.Case Title: JACK WILKEN VS. FRUITVALE HEALTHCARE CENTER et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 1, 2008, line 2, DEFENDANT SSC OAKLAND FRUITVALE OPERATING COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. ATTORNEYS' FEES ARE RECOVERABLE UNDER W&I SECTION 15600 AND FACTS PROVIDING A BASIS FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARE ALLEGED. =(302/PJM/JW)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN O'NEIL VS. MICHELLE D. BRODIE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Motion To Stay The Proceedins And To Vacate The Trial Date;
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 1, 2008, line 3, PLAINTIFF SUSAN O'NEIL'S Motion To Stay The Proceedings And To Vacate The Trial Date. THE MOTION IS GRANTED TO STAY THIS ACTION UNTIL MAY 1, 2009 OR UNTIL THE MARIN ACTION SETTLES, WHICHEVER OCCURS FIRST. THE PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO REQUEST THE PRESIDING JUDGE TO VACATE THE TRIAL DATE IN THIS ACTION. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE PREJUDICE AND RESOLUTION OF THE MARIN ACTION IS LIKELY TO FACILITATE RESOLUTION OF THIS ACTION. THE PARTIES MAY APPEAR TO PROPOSE A COORDINATED AND LIMITED DISCOVERY PLAN AS AN ALTERNATIVE. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: R.A.H. CORPORATION VS. GHANI FATHI AHMED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 1, 2008, line 4, DEFENDANT FATHI ABDEL GHANI'S COUNSEL'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel IS GRANTED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: CORY OBERDORFER VS. TURN("THE UTILITY REFORM NETWORK"), A NON PROFIT B et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Defts Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 1, 2008, line 5, PLAINTIFF CORY OBERDORFER'S Motion To Strike Defendants Motion To Strike IS OFF CALENDAR PER NOVEMBER 25, 2008 RULING. MOTION MOOT. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY VS. LARRY DUBAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Restraining Order; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 1, 2008, line 6, DEFENDANT LARRY DUBAN'S Motion For Restraining Order. THE MOTION IS DENIED FOR IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT THIS ACTION IS THE BEST WAY TO RESOLVE THE MALPRACTICE CLAIM. THE COURT IS NOT PERSUADED THAT BERKO WAIVED HIS RIGHT TO A JURY TRIAL AND THE VAST MAJORITY OF DOLLARS IN THE INTERPLEADER RELATE TO THE PREVIOUSLY FILED DISPUTE BETWEEN DUBAN AND BERKO. OMAN'S CLAIM TO THE INTERPLEADER FUNDS SEEMS OF LITTLE CONSEQUENCE. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH HAWKINS VS. TRAVELERS INS., LEVITZ, HANNA, BROPHY, MCALEER & et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: First Amended -Motion Of Transfer Notice Of Motion To Transfer Motion To Transfer To Trial Court
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 1, 2008, 11:30AM, line 7, PLAINTIFF JOSEPH HAWKINS First Amended -Motion Of Transfer Notice Of Motion To Transfer Motion To Transfer To Trial Court. HEARING REQUIRED, 11:30AM. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IS DENIED. COURT TREATS IT AS A MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION, AND PLAINTIFF PRESENTED NO NEW EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF ITS MOTION. AT THE HEARING, COURT WILL CONSIDER DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS UNDER CCP 128.7. =(302/PJM/JW)
